name: Beef Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef short ribs, with bones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup kettle, combine ribs, water, tomatoes, onion, and salt (if desired). Add pepper.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 1-1/2 to 2 hours or until meat is tender.
4. Remove ribs; cool. Skim fat from broth. Remove meat from bones and cut into bite-size pieces; return to broth.
5. Add carrots, celery, and cabbage; bring to boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Add barley; return to boil.
7. Reduce heat; cover and cook for 10-15 minutes or until barley and vegetables are tender.
8. Add parsley. (You might want to omit the salt and add low sodium beef broth cubes.)
